The '''''Counterpunch''''' was a [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class cruiser]] that operated in [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]'s third fleet.

In a daring operation, the ''Counterpunch'' was destroyed by [[Vispil]]ian security forces when the leaders of Vispil refused Zsinj's bribes and denied him use of their facilities.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Solo Command (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Mo}}
